extensionReload.reason: After extension reload, the existing Threads content-script context emitted Extension context invalidated until the page itself was reloaded.

b02ToggleTiming.summary: No 1-2s regression after reload. Toggle response is now 308.6-489.1ms; DOM wait is 370-724ms. Content start/stop reached the content script in 1.5-108.1ms.

samples.note: This sample overlapped one worker heartbeat response.

b02ToggleTiming.watch: Still a 300-500ms response path, but the Run 25 backend-healthy 925-1427ms self-restart regression is gone.

flow8B14.status: second root cause fixed in code; live recheck pending another extension reload

run26LiveBeforeSecondFix.topicList: work: 1 訊號 0/1 已完成 0 處理中 1 待處理; love: 1 訊號 0/1 已完成 0 處理中 1 待處理
run26LiveBeforeSecondFix.diagnosis: The Run 25 fix removed invalid 15/0 coverage but TopicDetailView still let non-topic-scoped signals.length inflate the audit overview denominator.

codeFix.behavior: When audit evidence or memos exist, audit overview sourceTotal is derived from audit artifacts and coverage parts. signals.length is only a fallback when no audit artifacts exist. Stale queuedCount is normalized to sourceTotal - analyzedCount.

copy.clipboardHead:
# Product Action Brief - 原文優先

## 使用方式
- 先處理 `值得嘗試`；這些可以轉成實驗、prototype 或 agent task。
- `保留觀察` 只作產品學習或後續研究，不應直接排入開發。

## 1. 討論 AI 生成內容的價值，用戶認為其價值取決於創作者意圖與具體應用場景（如工作優化或情感記憶）。

flow16B15.note: The Chrome connector clipboard reader returned an empty string, but macOS pbpaste showed the real 1190-character system clipboard content.

verification.build: npm run build -> pass; mirrored to output/chrome-mv3
